title: ochna riedeliana
intro: Ochna riedeliana, also known as the Mickey mouse plant, is a species of flowering plant in the family Ochnaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine in various parts of the world, particularly in Southern Africa, where it is valued for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Ochna riedeliana include its potential to treat fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, as well as its ability to boost the immune system. The plant is often prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and its leaves and roots are used in traditional remedies.
